overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist navigating a bustling medieval Middle Eastern marketplace. The character moves from covered market stalls through a gated plaza and into a courtyard with a central fountain, surrounded by Islamic stone architecture, NPCs in period clothing, and market elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market street with fabric awnings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market, navigating between wooden stalls and NPCs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple robe walking past the camera

entered.detail: large red fabric canopy stretched across the market street providing shade
rustic wooden stall with lattice walls and fabric coverings
tan stone building with arched doorways and wooden balconies
tall palm tree trunk visible rising above the market stalls
circular stone fire pit with flames burning

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered market street shaded by red fabric awnings. The protagonist walks forward through sandy ground, passing wooden market stalls on the right and stone buildings on the left. NPCs in period robes walk through the narrow space, and a stone fire pit burns near the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with large ceremonial gate

events.description: exits covered market into sunlit open plaza with large green metal gate

agents.ego_description: approaching the large green gate while navigating around a hay cart and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of robed NPCs walking toward the gate

entered.detail: ornate large green metal door with decorative patterns set in stone archway
wooden cart loaded with hay bales parked on the right side
low stone wall with decorative cutouts lining the path

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a sunlit plaza dominated by a large green metal gate ahead. The camera moves toward the gate, passing a hay cart on the right and stone railings. The market canopy is now behind, and the space feels more open with full sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with central fountain and colonnade

events.description: ascends stone steps into courtyard featuring a central water fountain

agents.ego_description: walking around the central fountain and through the courtyard, observing the water feature

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting by the fountain edge, appearing to rest or wash

entered.detail: rectangular stone water feature with clear water and stone border
row of stone arches supported by columns creating a covered walkway
wooden structure with vines overhead providing partial shade
large ceramic pots with blooming flowers lining the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character enters a beautiful courtyard with a central stone fountain and tiled flooring. A wooden pergola and arched colonnade provide partial shade, while potted flowers add color. An NPC sits by the fountain as the camera circles the water feature and heads toward the arched walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: colonnaded walkway with benches and hanging lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded colonnade, passing benches and potted plants

notable_agents.action: robed pedestrian walking toward the camera through the colonnade

entered.detail: large decorative stone arch with intricate tile patterns on the columns
brass lantern suspended from the ceiling of the colonnade
simple wooden bench placed against the wall for seating
bushes with vibrant blue flowers planted along the walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving through a shaded colonnade with stone arches and hanging lanterns, the scene features wooden benches and blue flowering bushes. The architecture shows intricate tile work on the columns as the character progresses toward a large stone archway ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: market street with fruit stalls and stone archway

events.description: begins ascending stone stairs through the large archway

agents.ego_description: walking up stone stairs through an archway while navigating past pedestrians

notable_agents.action: NPC in black robe with headscarf walking past the camera

entered.detail: wooden stall displaying colorful fruits including oranges and apples
overhanging wooden balcony with railings on the upper floor of the building
set of stone steps leading upward through the archway

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character approaching and ascending stone stairs through a large archway into a new market area. Fruit stalls with colorful produce line the right side, while wooden balconies overlook the street from above. The character continues upward through the archway as pedestrians pass by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded, narrow market street into a bright, open courtyard. It begins beneath red fabric awnings, moving past wooden stalls and stone buildings where NPCs in period robes walk across sandy ground. As the camera advances, the covered canopy gives way to a sunlit plaza, shifting the perspective toward a large green metal gate and passing a hay cart beside stone railings. The scene then opens further as the character enters a tiled courtyard, where the light filters through a wooden pergola and arched colonnades. Finally, the camera circles a central stone fountain adorned with potted flowers before heading toward the shaded arched walkway.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded, quiet colonnade into a bright and bustling open-air marketplace. It begins by gliding past stone arches and hanging lanterns, passing wooden benches and blue flowering bushes that accent the intricate tile work of the columns. As the camera progresses, the enclosed space leads toward a large stone archway that serves as a gateway to a more vibrant district. The scene then opens and ascends a set of stone stairs, shifting from the cool shadows of the walkway into a lively street lined with colorful fruit stalls and overlooking wooden balconies. Finally, the movement continues upward through the archway as pedestrians pass by, fully immersing the viewer in the activity of the market.
